name: Mock Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rice, nut, or soy milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend on high until smooth.
2. Transfer the mixture to a saucepan and heat over low to medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
3. Serve the sauce over your favorite vegetables or use it as desired (e.g., pizza topping, bread spread, quiche filling, lasagna layer, fondue ingredient).
